Dear Sir, 
 
Pursuant to Regulations 30 and 46 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) 
Regulations, 2015, we write to inform you that the transcript of the conference call on Q2FY23 results 
and business updates held on October 17, 2022 is uploaded on the website of the Company and the 
same is available under the tab Financial Statements >> FY 2022 - 2023 >> Q2 >> Conference Call 
Transcript at following webpage: 
 
https://www.oberoirealty.com/real-estate-investment/investors 
 
Request you to kindly take note of the above and oblige. 
 
Thanking you. 
 
For Oberoi Realty Limited
